title: Why
wikitext:
[]: Why...? [Spoilers]             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Aug 22, 2009 10:38 am Has anyone wondered why Kaworu's Eva Unit is called "The Mark 06" instead of Unit-06?

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sat Aug 22, 2009 10:42 am Some say it's typical Anno symbolism refering to Mark Chapter 6 in the Bible. http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mark_6 However I personally don't know... EDIT: Holy fuck 900 posts? When did that happen?!

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Aug 22, 2009 10:54 am master_lloyd wrote: Some say it's typical Anno symbolism refering to Mark Chapter 6 in the Bible. http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mark_6 However I personally don't know...

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Sat Aug 22, 2009 11:25 am I see no connection between Eva Mark 6 and the actual book of Mark 6 in the Bible. It may be one of Anno's symbols, remember his statement that he just uses biblical names and etc. because it sounds cool. I'll be looking for this statement to verify and to defend my claim.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Aug 22, 2009 12:24 pm Yes this is true, Anno could simply be making it seem cool but what if he has a different idea for the plot? What if he's going to make it turn out to be a plot where there actually is a God? Then we could have not only an Eva battle Royale, but a God fight possibly between Lilith, Adam, and God. Then Everyone character wise would be like DAMN!

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sat Aug 22, 2009 12:29 pm Hmmm, meh on that Wondie-chan. I think a big grandiose mega power battle like that would tip Eva into the territory of generic giant robot anime. Eva is all about the spiritual and psychological stuff, aside from the non macho main character its what speerated it from every other mecha anime out there and made it truly stand out and be unique and made it the hit it was.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Aug 22, 2009 12:32 pm Has Rebuild been generic so far? Also Eva is all about the spiritual and psychological stuff, aside from the non macho main character its what speerated it from every other mecha anime out there and made it truly stand out and be unique and made it the hit it was.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Aug 22, 2009 12:35 pm Yeah I understand that but has Unit 01 not been considered a God at one point both in Rebuild and in NGE? What Im getting at is that to bring a God in I think would amp up the whole religious symbolism to an actual religious inclusion. What if God or A God were to manifest within Unit 01? If Im goin too far with this just say so, I mean like, your the Great Genius!

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Aug 22, 2009 4:54 pm If a God actually existed in Evangelion, it'd be a boring fight since Lilith and Adam aren't deities by any stretch. They'd get creamed.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva4Dummies » Sat Aug 22, 2009 6:22 pm There might be a reference!! http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7255

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Aug 22, 2009 7:29 pm Like religious references have ever meant that religious concepts were literally present in Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Soul Fire » Sat Aug 22, 2009 7:58 pm Pehaps the fact the calling it Mk 06 puts it apart from other evangelions. It is just a clever device that tell us Mk06 is going to be important.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Aug 22, 2009 8:12 pm So the plot device will be piloting a... plot device. Makes sense.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sat Aug 22, 2009 11:48 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: So the plot device will be piloting a... a pile of AWESOME plot device. Makes sense.
